name: generate-video
description: Generate short videos from a text prompt or from still images using ByteDance Seedance on Volcengine Ark (火山方舟). Use this skill whenever the user wants to create, generate, render, or animate a video, clip, animation, motion graphic, or product demo — including text-to-video ("a drone shot over a forest at sunrise") and image-to-video, where a still becomes the first frame, or two stills are morphed start-to-end. Triggers include "generate a video", "make a clip", "animate this image", "turn thi
author: FradSer
